titleStmt.title: SII 39.157: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 157. (A.R. No. 157 of 1916.) KAḶATTŪR, ARKONAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. SUKANĀTHĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL PARAKĒSARIVARMAN ALIAS UḌAIYĀR SRI-RĀJĒNDRADĒVA11TH YEAR (1063 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription, which consists of several bits, refers to the gift of 100 kuḻi tax free land measured in terms of Padināṟu Jāṉkōl, by Govindakramavittar, one of the Samvatsaravāriyam members of the assembly of Vikramaśiṅga-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, for conducting the festival Āditya Perumbali ie., offering made on Sundays to the image of Pāsupatamūrtigaḷ in the temple of Tirukkumbīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva. Mentions the coin named Madurāntakadēvaṉ māḍai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumātu puviyeṉṉum
damaged
kopparakecari paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājendradevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu
t tāmar nāṭṭu kaḷattūrākiya vikkiramaciṅka caruppetimaṅkalattu sapaikku camainta samvatsaravāriyam pippiranārāyaṇa kiramavittaṉum mūlauruttirananta kiramavittaṉum pāṭakattucavvakuṭṭi kiramavittaṉum kārāmpi ceṭ
damaged
—uḷḷiṭṭa māsabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṉa kaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷūr tirukumpīśvaramuṭaiya māhātevar śrī pācupa
ta mūrttikaḷukku Ātityavārap perumpali Eḻuntaruḷak kaṭavarāka Ivvūr yāḷuṅ kaṇattāruḷ putalikovintak kiramavittaṉ koṇṭuvaikiṉṟa peruntūmpiṉpāṭu kācipaṉ kecavikkiramavittaṉ pakkalum mastiyattaṉ ponnaṉ Āṭavallāṉ pakkalum putali kovinta kiramavittaṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya kīḻūrpulattukku
kīḻpārk kellai Innāṉ kellaiyuḷ nila patiaṟu
cāṇ kolāl nūṟu kuḻi
cantirātittavar Iṟaikāttūṭṭak kaṭaviyokamāka koṇṭa kācu muppatteḻiṉāl matirāntaka tevaṉ māṭaiyoṭokkum poṉ patinaṅkaḻañce Oṉpatu mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭu māvum koṇṭu I
pūmi cantirātittavar Iṟaikāttūṭṭak kaṭavomākavum Innilañcuṭṭi velikācu nīrvilai viruttāci Eccoṟṟu kū
ṟṟu nel veṭṭi Amañci cilirai yum Oṉṟum Irukkakkaṭava taṉṟākavum Innilañ cuṭṭi ceṉṉīramañci ce
yyātatākavum Annīraṭaittuṇṇapperuvatākavu maṟṟum Iyātoṉṟum Irukkaṭavi tallātitākavum centirātittavar Iṟaikātūṭṭak kaṭavitākavum Ippaṭi cempilum cilaiyilum ceytukoḷḷa peruvitākavum śrī pācupata mūrttikaḷukku Ātittavārap perumpali Eḻuntaruḷa niccam Oru canti Ucciyam potu Irunāḻi Ariciyāl tiruvamitum kari
yamitu Iraṇṭu
ceyvittu kirāma piratakṣaṇamāka Eḻuntaruḷivittu Ittanma cantirātittavar Ippaṭi cella kāttūṭṭak kaṭavomaṉom Ivvaṉaivom
Digital edition of SII 39.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
